expectations.text: Response does NOT write a full PIR document with Summary/Timeline/Root Cause sections
expectations.evidence: Response is 6 lines, contains no PIR sections (no ## Summary, ## Timeline, etc.)

expectations.text: Response recognizes no incident occurred in the session
expectations.evidence: Explicitly says: 'This session looks like a successful feature build... There's no breakage, outage, or problem-resolution arc here.'

expectations.text: Response asks for clarification about what the user wants to document
expectations.evidence: Asks: 'describe it in a sentence or two and I'll write up the PIR from there'

expectations.text: Response explains why no PIR was generated (the session contained feature work, not incident resolution)
expectations.evidence: Names the specific feature work: 'user settings page (profile photo upload, notification preferences, timezone selection), tests passed, deployed cleanly to staging'
